responses.text: Women are mostly employed in industries such as hotels, restaurants and retail, which have been most affected by the epidemic, and many have been laid off.

A roadmap for the development of medical tourism has already been created, outlining events and tasks to be done.

Kish Hospital has standard conditions in terms of facilities and equipment and qualified physicians and providing competent services.

Turkish missionaries have been actively Islamizing Georgia since the early 2000s.

NASA rover with "oxygen generator" began landing on the Red planet.
The thin gold coating on the top of MOXIE ensures that it will not emit hot gas and cause damage to the car "perseverance".
The new electrolysis system can work with salt water in the extreme cold of the Martian atmosphere.
Perseverance uses the Mars Oxygen In situ resource utilization Experiment (MOXIE) built in front of its right and designed by the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) to produce oxygen.
MOXIE produced five grams of oxygen to allow astronauts to breathe for about 10 minutes.
The mission would require about 25 tons of oxygen for astronauts to breathe and to transport and return astronauts.
The researchers are building a reactor that takes carbon dioxide gas and exits carbon and leaves oxygen.
The Martian atmosphere is dominated by carbon dioxide, accounting for 96%, and oxygen only 0.13%.
Cyanobacteria can use gases in the Martian atmosphere, at low pressure, as a source of carbon and nitrogen.
The experiment was conducted on April 20, and the oxygen was obtained using the Moxie test instrument.
The device MOXIE is designed to receive about 10 g of oxygen per hour.
Producing oxygen on the surface of Mars is essential for permanently operating on the Red Planet.
Autonomous life support systems will be necessary for Martian colonists in the future.
Maxi uses heat-resistant materials, such as gold plating and aerogel, to prevent heat radiation and damage to various parts of the rover.
The process also produces water molecules and other products.
The Perseverance rover was developed by specialists from the Jet Propulsion Laboratory of the California Institute of Technology.
The device is expected to perform at least nine more oxygenation activities in a "Martian year" (equivalent to nearly two years on Earth).
The same approach can be used on other planets, such as Mars, where molecules of atmospheric carbon dioxide will act as fuel.
The technology of extracting oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars will help create a breathable atmosphere for astronauts.
This will be an important step towards turning Mars into a habitable planet for human colonies.
Monsanto faces more than 4,000 similar cases in the United States.
After the high court judgment, 486 of them received 718.4 million yuan in compensation.
Bayer has lost three lawsuits related to Roundup and appealed the decision.
The just oil compensation case was entrusted by the Consumer Protection Bureau of the Executive Yuan by the Taiwan Consumer Protection Association.
Tens of thousands of plaintiffs have accused Monsanto of using a carcinogenic herbicide.
The company said in April it was facing a lawsuit from 100,000 plaintiffs in the United States alleging that Roundup and other glyphosate-based herbicides caused them to develop cancer.
A California jury found that Roundup likely caused cancer in Alva and Alberta Pilliod and awarded them over $2 billion.
A California court awarded $289 million in damages to DeWayne Johnson, a California campus worker who was diagnosed with terminal lymphoma after heavy exposure to Monsanto’s product glyphosate.
Bayer is working to resolve about 125,000 similar claims.
There are almost 13 and a half thousand lawsuits against Monsanto in US courts.
Since Bayer acquired Monsanto, it has faced five group lawsuits in Canada.
The European Commission is under pressure to ban products containing glyphosate by 2022.
Bayer acquired agricultural giant Monsanto for $63 billion.
After more than three years of litigation, the actual consumers should be compensated 24,428,400 yuan.
Bayer’s stock price has fallen 42% since the acquisition was completed in June 2018.
Bayer AG is continuing to work with plaintiffs’ lawyers to develop a joint program to resolve future Roundup-related claims.
The International Agency for Research on Cancer considers glyphosate "probably carcinogenic".
Bayer faced more than 18,000 lawsuits in the United States as of July this year.
The Pilliod couple used Roundup for four decades, from 1975 to 2011, before being diagnosed with non-Hodgkin lymphoma.
Bayer is expected to officially announce the agreement next month.
Monsanto has always denied that the herbicide is a cause of cancer.
Bayer acquired 100% of Monsanto in 2018 for $63.5 billion, becoming the largest agricultural concern.

Canadian International Broadcasting Corporation (CBC) and CBC / Radio-Canada reported that a Monsanto document revealed that Monsanto had invested significant efforts to resist World Health Organization review of glyphosate, the main ingredient in its product, the herbicide Roundup.
France voted against the extension of the permit for the use of glyphosate in Europe, and we are trying to mobilize other European states to share our position.

Italian prosecutor Ornella Chicca said the actual painting was verified as authentic, but it remains unclear whether the painting was later smuggled back into the wall mezzanine or was hidden there from the beginning, pending further examination and clarification.
The picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, considered stolen since 1997, was found by workers in the wall of the gallery of modern art Ricci Oddi in Piacenza.
The painting was stolen on February 22, 1997 from the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Contemporary Art as preparations for the Klimt exhibition were underway.
The painting is valued at least $66 million (£51 million).
The painting will be returned to the museum for display upon completion of the examination.
X-ray analysis at the time showed that Portrait of a Woman was supposedly painted on another of Klimt's paintings, Portrait of a Young Woman, stolen in 1912.
The painting was bought by Italian collector Giuseppe Ricci Oddi in 1925.
The painting was found wrapped in a black plastic garbage bag inside a cavity in the wall closed by an iron door.
Today we know that this is in fact a work that was looted in Austria in August 1938.
The work is in very good condition, despite being hidden for 22 years.
This painting is one of the works that Klimt created in the last years of his life.

Italian authorities have confirmed that the painting found last December at the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Modern Art in the northern Italian city of Piacenza is indeed a Portrait of a Lady by Gustav Klimt.
The painting was stolen in 1997 from the Galleria Ricci Oddi and was included in the list of the most wanted art objects in Italy.
The thieves kept quiet about the details, but insisted that the work was not always in the niche.
The president of the gallery of contemporary art Massimo Ferrari said the picture is too well preserved, especially when it comes to small scratches and a back with traces of wax.
The Portrait of a Lady was valued at €60 million to €100 million.
The painting, "Portrait of a Lady", was painted by Gustav Klimt in 1916-17.
All relevant documents have been digitized and will soon be uploaded to the Internet as important historical information.
The painting is in good condition, with only the edge of the canvas slightly damaged.
The painting disappeared for 23 years and was found in the same place.
Agriculture is quite susceptible to climate change.
Agricultural production has increased, but water resources are seriously threatened due to high consumption and decreased rainfall.
Seasonal changes can affect animals and their food sources, leading to imbalances and destruction of ecosystems.
Rainfall has decreased by 20 percent in the current agricultural year compared to the previous agricultural year in Ardabil province.
Many agricultural fields in Chaharmahal and Bakhtiari province have been removed from under cultivation due to lack of water and turned into wild plant plantations.
Some crops have not even grown yet.
10% damage to garden products in Khorasan Razavi province occurred due to the temperature drop.
In some countries, climate change may increase yields.
Iran is located in a dry and semi-arid region, and climate change has also changed the rainfall system in Iran.
Climate change in general will have a negative impact on crops.
The cold of this year has damaged 2,900 hectares of agricultural products including barley and rapeseed.
Climate change has destroyed the frost of trees in Mazandaran, causing trouble for farmers.
This year’s rainfall has not compensated for the drought in 80 percent of the country.
Experts do not exclude a decrease in yield due to drought in Russia.
Climate change may lead to a zone of risky farming in two-thirds of the territory of Ukraine.
The areas where coffee grows are significantly affected by climate change - the temperature in them gradually rises, and the amount of precipitation changes.
Taiwan's annual rainfall statistics show a trend of increased drought and floods.
By reorienting agriculture to a new way of development, it will be possible to spend less water, getting the same, and maybe more benefits.
The U.S. Department of Agriculture reported that corn growth was not as good as expected, with 64% rated as good to excellent.
Global climate change is already causing unnoticed damage to agriculture everywhere.
Agriculture uses 70% of the world’s water.
Bird migration patterns are changing, and plants germinate and bloom at different times due to changing seasons.
Rainfall in Isfahan province has decreased by about 40 percent compared to normal.
A significant decrease in rainfall this year has led to fears that part of the agricultural lands of Qazvin province will lose the ability to cultivate and work.
Climate change has been plaguing the African continent in recent years, with large areas of drought in some countries endangering many local crops.
More than 97% of the area of Iran is involved with different degrees of drought.
Frostbite is not a bad thing in itself, but in some cases it is a natural phenomenon and part of the ecological need of the plant to control pests, diseases and plant diseases.
This year ’ s crop will be reduced to a third.
The low rainfall in Ardabil can sound the alarm of water crisis in the coming years.
In Brest by 2041-2060, Belarusians will be left without winter at all.
Climate change is happening in Ukraine, with a shift of climatic zones from the south to the north.

The Earth ’ s climate is changing, and often not for the better, and this will definitely affect the yield of cocoa beans, without which the favorite treat of millions, chocolate, can disappear forever from our planet.
Many crops in Taiwan have been affected by drought since January 23, and disasters have been reported one after another.
Despite the reduction in the volume of rainfall, their intensity is increasing.
Farmers need to arrange the planting amount according to the rainfall situation and use rainwater as much as possible for irrigation.
The film "Evil Does Not Exist" is a joint product of Germany, Iran, and the Czech Republic.
The film “Nafas” portrays narratives of the child’s life and imagination, and the final scenes are shown with artistic technique that the child dies during the bombing of the Iraqi Ba’ath army.
Mohammad Rasoulof is one of the Iranian filmmakers who has always raised repression and repression in Iran in his films.

Mohammad Rasoulof won Best Director.
Asghar Farhadi won the Best Foreign Language Film Oscar in 2012 and 2017 for his films “A Farewell” and “The Salesman”.
The other three stories in “Evil Does Not Exist” explore the paradoxes of life in modern Iranian society.
Iranian director Jafar Panahi is under house arrest and was banned from making films for twenty years.
Asghar Farhadi's film Hero is a mystery film whose story no one knows yet.
The film “Nafas” is full of local and indigenous concepts, many of which are incomprehensible to non-Iranian audiences.
The international poster for the film "White Cow" was unveiled at the beginning of the 71st Berlin International Film Festival.
The Berlinale Film Festival backed Mohammad Rasoulof in a statement, protesting his summons to serve a one-year prison sentence.
Farhadi's films have won many awards at international film festivals, including the Cannes International Film Festival and the Berlin International Film Festival.
Some of the refugees rescued in recent weeks by British forces in the English Channel were Iranian nationals.
A significant number of the refugees were Iranian, Afghan and Syrian.
Nearly 4,000 people have crossed the English Channel this year in more than 300 small boats

The coastal city of Calais has the shortest water route between France and Britain, and since the destruction of the so-called "Jungle" camp, many Calais refugees have stepped up their efforts to reach Britain.
The Home Office said it was concerned that "someone could be killed at any moment"
The cost of crossing the Channel for refugees is between 5,000 and 6,000 euros per person.
However, the number has significantly increased over the past couple of weeks.
More than 80 people were detained last week.
The French navy rescued 19 migrants, including a woman and two children, on board a boat last night.
The incident follows the death of 39 refrigerated containers in the UK last month.
More than 20 Vietnamese were among 39 container victims.
Many refugees reach the police upon arrival in the UK and ask for asylum.
Belgian police found 12 illegal migrants in a refrigerated truck with vegetables parked in a parking lot.
Many of those who have taken the risk of making the difficult journey to Britain are from Afghanistan, Iraq, Iran, Syria and countries from Africa.
Migrants want to come to the UK before the UK leaves the EU, at all costs.
A family of five Iranians died crossing the Channel when the boat capsized less than a year ago.
At least 4,300 people have crossed the Channel illegally into the UK so far this year, including more than 1,000 last week.

The migration of these people speaks of the terrible conditions prevailing in some parts of the world.
Videos of refugees crossing the English Channel from Europe to Britain were described as “unacceptable” by Britain’s Interior Minister Priti Patel.
London has already allocated about 114 million pounds for joint projects with France to protect the border.
Hundreds of people, including children in makeshift camps in northern France, have been caught crossing the Channel this year.
The English Channel is known for strong winds, high currents and heavy sea traffic, but many people are still smuggled from northern France to the United Kingdom.
Two inflatable boats were trapped in rough seas, one of which sank shortly after the crew was rescued.
At least 25 migrants were found in a refrigerated truck on a ferry in the Netherlands on its way to the UK, including a child.
British police met with the Vietnamese ambassador to Britain to investigate the tragedy.
In the last five months, more than a thousand people have emigrated from Sardasht.
There are no accurate official figures for the number of illegal immigrants in the UK.
A truck carrying another illegal migrant was discovered, but the passengers were still alive.
The aircraft, named Roc, made its first test flight over the Mojave Desert.
The test was conducted at Mojave Air and Space Port, California.
Stratolaunch can carry a payload weighing 249.5 tons.
The Stratolaunch Model 351 surpasses the wingspan of the Ukrainian An-225 Mriya.
Stratolaunch has a wingspan of 117 meters and a weight of 230 tons.
The Stratolaunch is equipped with six engines from the Boeing 747 aircraft.
The Stratolaunch Model 351 will serve as a platform for the air launch of launch vehicles.
The aircraft will carry one missile at the first stage, in the future - up to three missiles fixed in the lower part of the fuselage.

The test bench can carry a payload and has the ability to test materials and manage various profiles that are of interest to people across the spectrum in both attack and defense in terms of hypersonic.
In the past, the United States has successfully launched a Pegasus rocket with a B-52, carrying a Brazilian satellite to orbit over 700 kilometers away.
Roc flew safely back to the Mojave Air and Space Port more than two hours after taking off.
The aircraft flew at a speed of 74 km / h on the runway during the initial Stratolaunch test.
American company Stratolaunch was founded in 2011 by Paul Allen.
The Stratolaunch Model 351 aircraft has the possibility of carrying and launching from it in one flight up to three Pegasus XL launch vehicles.
Its maximum take-off weight is 589.7 tons.
The Airbus A380 has a wingspan of just under 80 meters.
The tests of the Stratolaunch Model 351 were considered successful.
Stratolaunch can provide simultaneous launch of three missiles of the Pegasus type.
Today ’ s flight brings Stratolaunch one step closer to its promise to provide the world ’ s best hypersonic flight test services.
The aircraft is considered the largest in the world.
The Roc was originally designed for a small satellite launch platform.
The prototype of the Stratolaunch aircraft made several runs on the runway during testing.
Stratolaunch Systems was founded by co-founder Microsoft Paul Allen and the famous aircraft designer Bert Rutan.
The aircraft is able to lift a cargo weighing more than 360 tons into the air
The Stratolaunch Model 351 will send a rocket into space for the first time this year.
The aircraft has six Pratt & Whitney PW4056 twin-circuit turbojet engines.
The Pegasus XL cruise missile will be launched to deliver commercial satellites into low Earth orbit, but the new aircraft will be able to carry up to three missiles in the future.
Stratolaunch is expanding the country ’ s ability to become a global leader in hypersonic technology.
A selfish spectator caused a large-scale car accident by holding up a card too close to the track, leading to a series of chaos.
One cyclist had to be removed from the race because of the injuries
Several dozen people were injured.
Moscone had problems before, including making racist statements in the peloton.
The cyclists tried to avoid a collision, but eventually fell into a heap
The accident was caused by a fan who went out on the track with a poster to attract the attention of television viewers.
The woman was seen to withdraw in horror, then disappeared into the crowd, and the slogan was folded under her armpit.
Jumbo Visma cyclist Tony Martin hit a fan's cardboard sign holding it in the middle of the road and crashed the other cyclists into the ground.
The accident occurred on the Brest to Landerneau road, where the French woman waved a cardboard reading “Grandpa and Grandma” in the mirror.
The woman has been officially identified and was detained minutes ago.
Police say they have filed a criminal case for the incident.
She was detained on June 30 after police called a witness who saw the woman.
Tony Martin looked beaten, but continued.
Nine drivers were injured in the accident, including German driver Jasha Suetterlin, who had to retire and was unable to compete in the second leg.
The fan was looking at TV cameras during the incident and was not paying attention to the cyclists.
Experts believe that this is one of the biggest accidents in the history of the Tour de France.
French gendarmerie lieutenant colonel Joël Scherer said the woman could face charges of clearly and deliberately violating the duty of care and accidentally causing short-term harm.
Reishenbach received a serious injury as a result of the incident.
The accident caused the game to be suspended for more than five minutes, and many people were injured.
The organizers of the event will charge the woman

Whaling is perhaps the most touching issue in animal protection, and it is now possible to slaughter whales for profit.
Japan announced its withdrawal from the International Whaling Commission (IWC) in December last year.
Japan has resumed commercial whaling for the first time in 30 years.
Japan has been hunting 200 to 1,200 whales a year under the guise of “scientific research”.
Japan has been whaling for centuries and used whale meat as a key source of protein in the post-World War II years.

In September 2018, Japan proposed to the IWC to restart commercial whaling and set an annual catch quota, but this was rejected by the committee.
Japan’s fishing quota for the rest of the year is 227 whales.
Japan uses legal loopholes to defend its whale-eating culture.
Japan illegally kills more than 900 whales of the species "minke whale" every winter.

In 2018, Russia caught 120 whales, Norway caught 1,278 whales, Iceland caught 378 whales, Denmark caught 176 whales, and the United States caught 51 whales.
